{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232009576C2A0138F68E297E98D4"}"},"total":755},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7479052137513632574","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体来说还是很不错的 题材很新颖，我看过很多天幕文，作者大大写得还是很不错的。结尾虽然潦草但是也算是作者的一种选择。希望作者大大继续加油，我要看你的另一本去啦。嘿嘿[爱心][爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741358161,"group_id":"7278878023217056822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人与人仅是如此，一期一会。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7hg/R0zTWqE1+A+znC32HwruuMOv6mwUq6D/1CJZeh0","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4071e681a1da4dcc86fc73968ee2fbc4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788692&x-signature=wtgv5WJvtaK1s6vYn0zh74KQLwE%3D","user_id":"2106310445500311","user_name":"苏尛繎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2106310445500311","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1716305764,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7278878023217056822","book_info":{"abstract":"一直作为一个21世纪社畜打工人的苏诗双，从未想过有一天会被未转世之前的自己背刺。
一份订单，贴心的系统直接把她刷的视频播放到了历朝历代。
……
看到天空上的光幕终于开始换成别的样子的历朝历代一开始是惊喜的，认为是天神终于降临，然后……
【皮烤的焦焦脆脆的碳烤脆皮猪，来了必点！必点！】
秦始皇：？？？来自秦皇的问号。
【软烂入味的鲜炖耙蹄花，来了不吃后悔一辈子！】
刘彻：？？？来自汉武的不解。
【手臂长的波士顿大龙虾，你真的不想尝尝吗？】
李世民：？？？来自唐太宗的疑惑。
等到了这些视频动不动一直在天上挂着，并且疯狂回放的时候……
历朝历代：啊，这些美食看起来真的很好吃的样子……
（排雷：主要的主角是系统，是系统。宿主只是系统来到这个世界的媒介。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/897fc54fed28b68195691c4a020f00f5","author":"胖胖的栗子","author_id":"","book_id":"7278878023217056822","book_name":"震惊！我刷的视频被老祖宗偷窥","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7278878115605152268","read_count":"12911","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"616263"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"277","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,直播","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b667e599e11f80e665ab67fa68c2992b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451797&x-signature=jRaye%2FjxloDIcz13cmLM%2BtLgVmc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1662074812892951","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"317"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232009576C2A0138F68E297E98D4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读25小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":80286,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":90378,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1335},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id
